prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约13376→19260→28881→21656→20939，整体呈后移趋势，2023年出现较大波动（28881），2024–2025年有所回升并稳定在约2.1万附近；2025年基准约20939名；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为49、52、49、49、47人，基本稳定在49人左右；2026年计划大幅扩招至75人，较2025年增加约59.6%，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第66名，近年排名稳定在65–70区间，属于中上水平财经类院校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及学校预约入校政策等常规管理话题，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第92位（一般），短视频曝光量处于中游水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；应用经济学A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理A、统计学A-，财经类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2024年评估为分化观望，较2023年小幅升温，但整体仍处于分化状态；河南省2026年高考报名总人数约120万，较2025年（约90.7万）大幅增加约32%，其中物理类考生估算约73.4万（较2025年55.5万增加约17.9万），竞争基数显著扩大；西南财经大学位于四川成都，在河南省招生占比约3.9%（2025年），属跨省招生，无本省偏好优势；四川省内招生占比约4.3%，整体招生分布较均匀。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约20939名、2026年计划大幅扩招59.6%带来的宽松效应，以及河南省物理类考生增加约32.3%导致的竞争加剧，两者对冲后扩招幅度仍大于考生增幅，整体竞争略有缓解；但考虑学校财经类优势学科吸引力及专业热度分化，位次不会过度后移。预测2026年最低位次约28223名，区间27723–28723名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 13376 → 19260 → 28881 → 21656 → 20939, showing an overall backward trend, with a significant fluctuation in 2023 (28881), and a recovery and stabilization around 21,000 in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is about 20939; the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 49, 52, 49, 49, 47 respectively, basically stable around 49; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 75, an increase of about 59.6% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 65–70 range in recent years, belonging to upper-middle level finance and economics institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, only involving routine management topics such as school reservation policies, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 92nd (average), short video exposure at a mid-level, no abnormal surge in application attention; Applied Economics A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/finance and economics/economics majors in 2024 is assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, slightly warming compared to 2023, but still in a divergent state; the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000), of which physics category candidates are estimated to be about 734,000 (an increase of about 179,000 from 555,000 in 2025), significantly expanding the competition base; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, with about 3.9% of its enrollment in Henan Province (2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference advantage; the enrollment proportion within Sichuan Province is about 4.3%, with a relatively even overall enrollment distribution.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of about 20939, the easing effect of a 59.6% expansion in the 2026 plan, and the intensified competition due to a 32.3% increase in physics category candidates in Henan Province, the expansion still outweighs the candidate increase after offsetting, slightly easing overall competition; however, considering the attractiveness of the university's advantageous finance and economics disciplines and the divergence in major popularity, the ranking will not shift excessively backward. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 28223, with a range of 27723–28723.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2026 → 2097 → 2147 → 6088 → 3030. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized in the 2000–2150 range. In 2024, it anomalously shifted to 6088, and in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 3030. Over the past five years, fluctuations have been large, with a baseline of about 3030 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 30, 33, 30, 31, and 24 students respectively, with a reduction to 24 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is to restore to 30 students, an increase of 25% compared to 2025, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 66th, with recent rankings stable in the 65–70 range, making it a mid-to-upper level finance and economics institution. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only routine management topics such as the university's appointment-based campus entry policy, with no significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 92nd (average), with short video exposure at a mid-level, showing no signs of abnormal attention for applications. Applied Economics is A+ (top nationally), Business Administration is A, and Statistics is A-, highlighting strong disciplinary strength in finance and economics, which strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/financial/economics majors was assessed as differentiated and wait-and-see, with a slight increase compared to 2023. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000). Among them, history category examinees are estimated at about 466,000 (an increase of about 114,000 from 352,000 in 2025), significantly expanding the competitive base. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, and its enrollment share in Henan Province is about 3.9% (2025), making it an inter-provincial enrollment with no local preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 3030, the easing effect of a 25% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 32.3% increase in history category examinees in Henan Province, the two factors offset each other with the increase in examinees slightly larger than the expansion, leading to a slight overall intensification of competition. However, after the anomalous value in 2024 (6088), the ranking rebounded significantly to 3030 in 2025, indicating that the university still has strong appeal in the liberal arts/history category. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3435, with a range of 2935–3935.
